_comment: Per-brand classification for the Egregious Rotation banner renderer. If hasTextInLogo=true, the brand's logo already contains the brand name as a wordmark, so the separate text label is omitted to avoid redundancy and the logo is rendered larger. If false, the logo is a mark only (no readable brand name) and the text label is kept. Hand-curated 2026-06-08; consumed by scripts/build-egregious-banners.mjs.
